top_signals.title: Yen Short Bets Jump to Nine-Year High as Carry Trade Revives
top_signals.summary: Speculators have boosted their bets against the yen to a nine-year high, signaling the revival of the yen carry trade despite intervention risks and a potential rate hike by the Bank of Japan on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan, Korean Stocks Gain on Strait of Hormuz Reopening Hopes
top_signals.summary: Japanese and Korean stocks gained after oil prices fell as Donald Trump said the US and Iran will sign a peace deal later this week to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin shoots higher on Iran peace deal, with Strait of Hormuz set to open
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s gold market cools amid ETF outflows: report
top_signals.summary: Chinese gold exchange-traded funds recorded their first monthly outflows since August 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Norsk Hydro hit by second aluminum supply crisis
top_signals.summary: The Norwegian multinational faces fresh delivery risks after Qatalum ended a key sales agreement amid ongoing Middle East turmoil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Scripted to fail — Europe’s critical minerals blind spot
top_signals.summary: If Europe finds itself struggling to secure the materials required for the energy transition, the narrative often tends toward simply being outmatched, writes Nicholas Vafeas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
top_signals.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway
top_signals.summary: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mining’s next boom is off the map: Arctic ice, abyssal plains and asteroids
top_signals.summary: Depletion, lower ore grades and higher prices pushing miners to new frontiers. The Arctic is already drawing capital, deep-sea mining is moving into a regulatory fight, and space remains the long-dated option.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Triple Flag buys gold stream on Ravenswood mine for $440M
top_signals.summary: The Ravenswood mine is one of the 10 largest gold mines in Australia by ore reserves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Silver stockpile drawdown risk is misunderstood
top_signals.summary: The drawdown has reinforced a broader narrative of tightening supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Baffinland gets $110M loan, court-approved extension
top_signals.summary: The Ontario Superior Court of Justice gave Baffinland immediate access to $110 million.

alerts.title: Hertha Metals targets rare earth magnet supply gap with Texas high-purity iron plant
alerts.summary: Company plans to break ground this summer on a plant that will produce 10,000 tonnes per year of high-purity iron used in permanent magnets.
